signatures.label: useRouter(): AppRouterInstance
signatures.documentation: Returns the App Router instance for programmatic navigation. Only available in Client Components.

signatures.label: redirect(url: string, type?: RedirectType): never
signatures.documentation: Redirects to the given URL. Can be used in Server Components, Route Handlers, and Server Actions.

parameters.label: url: string
parameters.documentation: The URL to redirect to. Can be relative or absolute.

parameters.label: type?: RedirectType
parameters.documentation: 'replace' (default) or 'push'. Only relevant in Server Actions.

signatures.label: revalidatePath(path: string, type?: 'page' | 'layout'): void
signatures.documentation: Purges cached data on-demand for a specific path.

parameters.label: path: string
parameters.documentation: The file system path to revalidate, e.g. '/blog/post-1'.

parameters.label: type?: 'page' | 'layout'
parameters.documentation: The type of path to revalidate.

signatures.label: revalidateTag(tag: string): void
signatures.documentation: Purges cached data on-demand for a specific cache tag.

signatures.label: useSearchParams(): ReadonlyURLSearchParams
signatures.documentation: Returns the current URL's search parameters as a read-only URLSearchParams. Client Component only.

signatures.label: usePathname(): string
signatures.documentation: Returns the current pathname string. Client Component only.

signatures.label: useParams(): Params
signatures.documentation: Returns an object containing the current route's dynamic parameters.

signatures.label: notFound(): never
signatures.documentation: Throws a NEXT_NOT_FOUND error, rendering the closest not-found.tsx.

signatures.label: generateStaticParams(): Promise<Params[]>
signatures.documentation: Generates static params for dynamic route segments at build time.

signatures.label: generateMetadata(props: { params: Params; searchParams: SearchParams }, parent: ResolvingMetadata): Promise<Metadata>
signatures.documentation: Generates dynamic metadata for a route segment.

parameters.label: props: { params: Params; searchParams: SearchParams }
parameters.documentation: Route props containing dynamic params and search params.

parameters.label: parent: ResolvingMetadata
parameters.documentation: Resolved metadata from parent route segments.

signatures.label: NextResponse.json(body: any, init?: ResponseInit): NextResponse
signatures.documentation: Creates a Next.js response with JSON body.

parameters.label: body: any
parameters.documentation: The response body, will be JSON-serialized.

signatures.label: NextResponse.redirect(url: string | URL, status?: number): NextResponse
NextResponse.rewrite(url: string | URL): NextResponse
signatures.documentation: Rewrites (proxies) the request to a different URL without changing the browser URL.

signatures.label: headers(): ReadonlyHeaders
signatures.documentation: Returns the incoming request headers. Only available in Server Components and Route Handlers.

signatures.label: cookies(): ReadonlyRequestCookies
signatures.documentation: Returns the incoming request cookies. Can read, set, and delete cookies.

signatures.label: unstable_cache(fn: Function, keyParts?: string[], options?: { revalidate?: number; tags?: string[] }): Function
signatures.documentation: Caches the result of an expensive function on the server.

parameters.label: fn: Function
parameters.documentation: The async function whose result should be cached.

parameters.label: keyParts?: string[]
parameters.documentation: Additional keys to uniquely identify the cache entry.

parameters.label: options?: { revalidate?: number; tags?: string[] }
parameters.documentation: Cache options: revalidation period in seconds and cache tags.

signatures.label: dynamic(loader: () => Promise<ComponentType>, options?: DynamicOptions): ComponentType
signatures.documentation: Lazily loads a component with optional SSR disable and custom loading component.

parameters.label: loader: () => Promise<ComponentType>
parameters.documentation: A function that returns a dynamic import.

signatures.label: useSelectedLayoutSegment(parallelRoutesKey?: string): string | null
signatures.documentation: Returns the active route segment one level below the Layout it is called from.

parameters.label: parallelRoutesKey?: string
parameters.documentation: Optional parallel route key to read from.
